productDisplayName: Wildcraft Unisex Grey Digital Series Camera Bag
description: Grey, padded camera bag with branding in the frontA detachable neck strap, loop at the back and two flaps with Velcro closure to attach to the belt or backpack strapOne main zipped compartment to hold the camera, an internal mesh slip pocket to hold SD cardsAn external pocket in the front with a flap and Velcro closure to hold extra batteriesWarranty: 1 yearPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
